title: Spring Framework 7.0.0-M8 版本发布
author: bclozel
content:
On behalf of the team and everyone who has contributed, I am pleased to announce a new milestone for the next Spring Framework generation. We have compiled all the upgrade information, new features and deprecations on the Spring Framework 7.0 release notes preview page.

API Versioning updates

This is another feature-rich milestone for the API Versioning support. There are quite a few refinements around the configuration model and how we ensure that the API Versioning setup is valid. We also now support inserting API Version information in Media Types on the client side. We are receiving lots of good feedback, keep it coming!

You can see the updated documentation in the API Versioning for MVC section.

RestTestClient

This is a popular enhancement request coming from the community: providing a non-reactive variant for WebTestClient. Developers like the way WebTestClient can test live servers and mock setups, with a fluent API and nice assertions.

This is now done with the new RestTestClient; you can bind it to a live server, an MVC @Controller or the application context. See the new RestTestClient documentation section for more.

@HttpServiceClient

The interface client support is expanding with the new @HttpServiceClient annotation. Annotated interfaces are excluded from @ImportHttpServices scans, so there is no overlap with scans for client interfaces when pointed at the same package. This feature allows for more flexible setups and opens the door for better integration in Spring Boot.

See the interface clients configuration section in the documentation.

PathPattern matching improved

As of Spring Framework 7.0, the legacy AntPathMatcher variant for matching HTTP request mappings is being deprecated. We started this migration back in 5.0, introducing the PathPattern option, then making it the default.

Community members reached out and shared that there was one last missing feature that was preventing their upgrade: the ability to match many path segments at the beginning of the path (think, "/**/pages/index.html"). This is now supported, and we described more thoroughly the allowed patterns in the reference documentation.

And much more!

There are plenty of other changes. As usual, you can check the detailed changelog for more details.

7.0.0-M8 is now available from https://repo.spring.io and Maven Central.

Project Page | GitHub | Issues | Documentation
aiSummary: 发布 Spring Framework 7.0.0-M8 版本，重点介绍了重要更新，包括改进的 API 版本控制、新的 RestTestClient、增强的 @HttpServiceClient 以及改进的 PathPattern 匹配等。
oneSentenceSummary: 发布 Spring Framework 7.0.0-M8 版本，重点介绍了重要更新，包括改进的 API 版本控制、新的 RestTestClient、增强的 @HttpServiceClient 以及改进的 PathPattern 匹配等。
summary: Spring Framework 7.0.0-M8 版本正式发布，引入了多项关键增强功能。这些功能旨在改善开发者体验，并提升框架能力。一项重大更新包括改进 API 版本管理支持，增强其配置模型和验证，以及新的客户端媒体类型注入。`RestTestClient` 的引入解决了社区的一个突出需求，为跨实时服务器、MVC 控制器或应用程序上下文的灵活测试提供了一种非反应式替代方案，替代 `WebTestClient`。此外，新的 `@HttpServiceClient` 注解扩展了接口客户端支持，通过防止扫描重叠，实现了更灵活的设置并改进了与 Spring Boot 的集成。最后，`PathPattern` 匹配已得到显著改进，以支持高级路径段（例如，`"/**/pages/index.html"`），从而解决了某些用户的关键升级障碍，并弃用了旧版 `AntPathMatcher`。

mainPoints.point: 改进的 API 版本管理支持增强了配置、验证和客户端媒体类型注入。
mainPoints.explanation: 这些更新为开发者提供了更强大、更灵活的机制来管理 API 版本，这对于在复杂应用程序中保持兼容性和发展服务至关重要。

mainPoints.point: 新的 `RestTestClient` 提供了一个非反应式的、流畅的 API，用于全面的应用程序测试。
mainPoints.explanation: 这项备受请求的功能提供了一个多功能的工具，用于测试实时服务器、MVC 控制器或应用程序上下文，从而显著提高开发者的生产力和测试灵活性。

mainPoints.point: `@HttpServiceClient` 扩展了接口客户端支持，实现了更灵活的 Spring Boot 集成。
mainPoints.explanation: 此注解通过管理客户端接口扫描来简化配置，防止重叠，并在 Spring 生态系统中促进更强大和模块化的应用程序开发。

mainPoints.point: 改进的 `PathPattern` 匹配现在支持高级路径段匹配，促进了更平滑的升级。
mainPoints.explanation: 此增强功能解决了长期存在的限制，允许使用复杂的模式，消除了用户从旧版 `AntPathMatcher` 配置迁移的重大障碍。

keyQuotes: 这是 API 版本控制支持的又一个功能丰富的里程碑。
现在可以通过新的 `RestTestClient` 完成；您可以将其绑定到实时服务器、MVC `@Controller` 或应用程序上下文。
注解接口将从 `@ImportHttpServices` 扫描中排除，因此在指向同一包时，客户端接口的扫描不会重叠。
社区成员联系并分享说，缺少一个最后的特性阻止了他们的升级：即在路径开头匹配多个路径段的能力（例如，`"/**/pages/index.html"`）。
